description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:7 Docker image with a cache of node_modules keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. Define a single deploy stage and two jobs: deploy_develop runs only on the develop branch, sets the environment to develop, runs npm install, then npm run build -- -e $CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG and npm run deploy; deploy_production runs only on the master branch, sets the environment to production, runs npm install, then npm run build -- -e $CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG and npm run deploy. Both jobs share the same before_script, cache and use no artifacts or services.
